title: ophrys × biagiolii
intro: Ophrys × biagiolii, also known as the Biagio's Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys bombyliflora and Ophrys sphegodes. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Ophrys × biagiolii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Ophrys × biagiolii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
